behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all files (app-page.ts, app_page_loader_tree.rs, app.rs, chunk_group_info.rs), the specific enums (ChunkGroupEntry, ChunkGroup, ChunkGroupKey), the parameter names (client_shared_entries, has_layout_segments), the transition string (next-server-utility), and all import paths checked.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is broken and what needs to be present (new variant, Option parameter) without specifying exact code or line replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests hard-code the specific name 'SharedMultiple' (test_shared_multiple_in_chunk_group_entry/ChunkGroup/ChunkGroupKey/pattern_matching) — a correct alternative fix using a differently-named variant (e.g., 'SharedEntries', 'MultipleShared') would fail, though instruction.md doesn't prescribe this name.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All shown tests use Node.js regex/string scanning of source files (e.g., enumMatch[1].includes('SharedMultiple'), checking for 'Option<' in function signature) rather than compiling/running the Rust code or executing the build.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each test checks for a meaningful code change (transition annotation presence, enum variant existence, parameter type change) that requires actually implementing the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All five numbered issues in instruction.md have corresponding tests (transitions added, fillMetadataSegment transition removed, Option parameter, SharedMultiple variant + pattern matching, no EvaluatableAssets::empty()).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and are grouped with section comments (fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files/functions at the level required to understand the task, without pointing to exact lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no agentmd-edits config changes.
